team_name: AadeshPaalan — Contempt Risk Radar for Court Compliance in CCMS
summary: Build an AI system that can read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and present human-verified data in a dashboard for government use to prevent missed compliance and appeal deadlines.
optimization_claims: Weeks to seconds for directive extraction
Missed directives reduced to near zero
Continuity maintained even after officer transfers
constraints_addressed: Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
